title: Epic Knights: Shields Armor and Weapons
body:
![top_image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5e67e18f8e368cf1bbdfe006ab8941516ee60cec.webp)
![bh_description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/177f84af906fb27f250597f47f2342cafd66048b.webp)
This mod aims to make the player feel like a medieval knight. At the moment, the modification contains a lot of new banner patterns, 16 sets of armor, 8 types of shields and 26 types of weapons, most of which can be made from 11 available materials: wood, stone, iron, gold, diamond, netherite, steel (new), copper, silver, tin, bronze.These weapons have special features like increased range and armor piercing. Also this mod adds steel to the game, which will not conflict with steel from other modifications. To craft steel, put an iron ingot in a blast furnace. On the latest version you can apply a banner on armor and horse armor (just like on a shield) and dye some types of armor. Configs are in the config/epicknights folder.

**More historical stuff:**
- [Epic Knights: Addon](https://modrinth.com/mod/epic-knights-addon)
- [Epic Knights: Slavic Armory ](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/epic-knights-slavic-armory)
- [Epic Knights: Antique Legacy ](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/epic-knights-antique-legacy)
- [Epic Knights: Ores and Alloys](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/epic-knights-ores-and-alloys/)
- [Epic Knights: Artillery Addon](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/epic-knights-artillery-addon)
- [Ranged Knights Medieval Boomsticks and Sharpsticks](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/rk-medieval-boomsticks-and-sharpsticks)
- [Epic Knights: Open Helms](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/epic-knights-open-helms)

**IMPORTANT:** Optifine 1.20.x is not supported! Since 7.0 version the mod requires [Architectury](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/architectury-api) and [Cloth Config](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cloth-config) to be installed.[![Discord Button](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/73fb758cd14024d6ec50ce7d9a33dafcad636ea0.png)](https://discord.gg/R8U8Hpgr75)

![](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Epic_Knights/BH_Epic_Knights_Screenshot.webp)


![bh_compatibilities](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0aaf25c9a1304eb266725809d71c791b153a9c29.webp)
Better Combat:1.18.2+: Preset support.

**Epic Fight**:
**1.20.1:** Preset support

To combine Epic Knights with Epic Fight on older versions do the following:

1.12.2: Download epicfight.cfg from Discord server and put it into the configs folder.

1.16.5, 1.18.2, 1.19.2: Download datapack from [Discord server](https://discord.gg/R8U8Hpgr75), unzip it and follow this tutorial: [https://minecraft.fandom.com/wiki/Tutorials/Installing\_a\_data\_pack.](https://minecraft.fandom.com/wiki/Tutorials/Installing_a_data_pack)

[32x32 Resources](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/knightarmory) There is a 32x resource pack made with the outstanding attention to details by Reymecos: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/knightarmory](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/knightarmory)
